## Verses (13)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | Have mercy on me, O God, for man is attempting my destruction; every day he makes cruel attacks against me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | My haters are ever ready to put an end to me; great numbers are lifting themselves up against me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | In the time of my fear, I will have faith in you. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | In God will I give praise to his word; in God have I put my hope; I will have no fear of what flesh may do to me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | Every day they make wrong use of my words; all their thoughts are against me for evil. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | They come together, they are waiting in secret places, they take note of my steps, they are waiting for my soul. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | By evil-doing they will not get free from punishment. In wrath, O God, let the peoples be made low. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | You have seen my wanderings; put the drops from my eyes into your bottle; are they not in your record? | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | When I send up my cry to you, my haters will be turned back; I am certain of this, for God is with me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | In God will I give praise to his word; in the Lord will I give praise to his word. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | In God have I put my hope, I will have no fear of what man may do to me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | I keep the memory of my debt to you, O God; I will give you the offerings of praise. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | Because you have taken my soul from the power of death; and kept my feet from falling, so that I may be walking before God in the light of life. | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
